parameters.name: countries
parameters.value: ={{ ['latvia','lithuania','belarus','poland','russia','finland'].filter((country) => ({ latvia: $json.useLatvia, lithuania: $json.useLithuania, belarus: $json.useBelarus, poland: $json.usePoland, russia: $json.useRussia, finland: $json.useFinlandContextOnly })[country]).join(',') }}

parameters.jsCode: const req=$('normalize_input').first().json||{};const h=$('fetch_elurikkus_history').first().json||{};const r=$('fetch_estonia_recent').first().json||{};const w=$('fetch_weather').first().json||{};const f=$('fetch_ebird_foreign').first().json||{};const num=v=>{v=Number(v);return Number.isFinite(v)?v:null};const clean=v=>String(v||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const iso=v=>{if(!v)return null;const d=new Date(v);return Number.isNaN(d.getTime())?null:d.toISOString()};const days=v=>{const d=iso(v);if(!d)return null;return Math.max(0,Math.round((Date.now()-new Date(d).getTime())/86400000))};const dist=(a,b,c,d)=>{const x=[a,b,c,d].map(Number);if(x.some(v=>!Number.isFinite(v)))return null;const [la1,lo1,la2,lo2]=x.map(v=>v*Math.PI/180);const dLa=la2-la1,dLo=lo2-lo1,s1=Math.sin(dLa/2),s2=Math.sin(dLo/2);const q=s1*s1+Math.cos(la1)*Math.cos(la2)*s2*s2;return 6371*2*Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(q),Math.sqrt(1-q))};const bearing=(a,b,c,d)=>{const x=[a,b,c,d].map(Number);if(x.some(v=>!Number.isFinite(v)))return null;const [la1,lo1,la2,lo2]=x.map(v=>v*Math.PI/180);const y=Math.sin(lo2-lo1)*Math.cos(la2),xx=Math.cos(la1)*Math.sin(la2)-Math.sin(la1)*Math.cos(la2)*Math.cos(lo2-lo1);return (Math.atan2(y,xx)*180/Math.PI+360)%360};const eta=d=>d==null?'unknown':d<=1?'24-48h':d<=3?'2-4d':d<=7?'4-7d':'7d+';const cc=v=>{v=clean(v).toLowerCase();if(v==='fi'||v.includes('finland'))return'FI';if(v==='lv'||v.includes('latvia'))return'LV';if(v==='lt'||v.includes('lithuania'))return'LT';if(v==='pl'||v.includes('poland'))return'PL';if(v==='by'||v.includes('belarus'))return'BY';if(v==='ru'||v.includes('russia'))return'RU';return v.toUpperCase()};const points=(Array.isArray(h.estoniaHistoryPoints)?h.estoniaHistoryPoints:[]).map((p,i)=>({id:clean(p.id)||'ee-'+i,lat:num(p.lat??p.decimalLatitude),lon:num(p.lon??p.decimalLongitude),eventDate:iso(p.eventDate??p.obsDt??p.date),locality:clean(p.locality??p.locName??p.location),municipality:clean(p.municipality??p.countyOrParish??p.county),source:clean(p.source)||'Estonia history'})).filter(p=>p.lat!=null&&p.lon!=null);const latest=points.filter(p=>p.eventDate).sort((a,b)=>new Date(b.eventDate)-new Date(a.eventDate))[0]||null;const mkClusters=()=>{const m=new Map();for(const p of points){const k=(Math.round(p.lat*4)/4).toFixed(2)+':'+(Math.round(p.lon*4)/4).toFixed(2);(m.get(k)||m.set(k,[]).get(k)).push(p)}return [...m.entries()].map(([id,ps],i)=>{const freq=a=>[...a.entries()].sort((x,y)=>y[1]-x[1]||x[0].localeCompare(y[0]))[0]?.[0]||'';const loc=new Map(),mun=new Map();ps.forEach(p=>{if(p.locality)loc.set(p.locality,(loc.get(p.locality)||0)+1);if(p.municipality)mun.set(p.municipality,(mun.get(p.municipality)||0)+1)});const lat=ps.reduce((s,p)=>s+p.lat,0)/ps.length,lon=ps.reduce((s,p)=>s+p.lon,0)/ps.length;return{clusterId:id,id,label:freq(loc)||freq(mun)||lat.toFixed(3)+' '+lon.toFixed(3),name:freq(loc)||freq(mun)||lat.toFixed(3)+' '+lon.toFixed(3),locality:freq(loc),municipality:freq(mun),lat:+lat.toFixed(5),lon:+lon.toFixed(5),count:ps.length,recentCount:ps.filter(p=>(days(p.eventDate)??9999)<=30).length,newestEventDate:ps.map(p=>p.eventDate).filter(Boolean).sort().reverse()[0]||null}})};const clusters=(Array.isArray(h.estoniaHistoryClusters)&&h.estoniaHistoryClusters.length?h.estoniaHistoryClusters.map((c,i)=>({clusterId:clean(c.clusterId??c.id)||'c-'+i,id:clean(c.id??c.clusterId)||'c-'+i,label:(()=>{const raw=clean(c.label??c.name);const loc=clean(c.locality);const mun=clean(c.municipality);const ugly=/^\d+(?:[d.]\d+)?[ :]+\d+(?:[d.]\d+)?$/i.test(raw);return (!raw||ugly)?(loc||mun||('Cluster '+(i+1))):raw;})(),name:(()=>{const raw=clean(c.label??c.name);const loc=clean(c.locality);const mun=clean(c.municipality);const ugly=/^\d+(?:[d.]\d+)?[ :]+\d+(?:[d.]\d+)?$/i.test(raw);return (!raw||ugly)?(loc||mun||('Cluster '+(i+1))):raw;})(),locality:clean(c.locality),municipality:clean(c.municipality),lat:Number(c.lat),lon:Number(c.lon),count:Math.max(1,Number(c.count||1)),recentCount:Math.max(0,Number(c.recentCount||0)),newestEventDate:iso(c.newestEventDate??c.latestDate)})).filter(c=>Number.isFinite(c.lat)&&Number.isFinite(c.lon)):mkClusters());const rows=Array.isArray(f.foreignRecentPoints)?f.foreignRecentPoints:Array.isArray(f.rows)?f.rows:Array.isArray(f.observations)?f.observations:Array.isArray(f)?f:[];const enabled=[req.useFinlandContextOnly?'FI':null,req.useLatvia?'LV':null,req.useLithuania?'LT':null,req.usePoland?'PL':null,req.useBelarus?'BY':null,req.useRussia?'RU':null].filter(Boolean);const fp=rows.map((row,i)=>({id:clean(row.id)||'fr-'+i,lat:num(row.lat??row.latitude),lon:num(row.lon??row.lng??row.longitude),obsDt:iso(row.obsDt??row.observationDate??row.date),locName:clean(row.locName??row.hotspotName??row.name),howMany:num(row.howMany??row.recordCount??row.count),country:cc(row.country??row.countryCode??row.regionCode),region:clean(row.region??row.subnational1Code),daysAgo:Number.isFinite(Number(row.daysAgo))?Number(row.daysAgo):days(row.obsDt??row.observationDate??row.date),source:'eBird'})).filter(p=>p.lat!=null&&p.lon!=null&&enabled.includes(p.country));const fm=new Map();for(const p of fp){const k=(Math.round(p.lat*4)/4).toFixed(2)+':'+(Math.round(p.lon*4)/4).toFixed(2);(fm.get(k)||fm.set(k,[]).get(k)).push(p)}const fc=[...fm.entries()].map(([id,ps])=>({clusterId:id,lat:+(ps.reduce((s,p)=>s+p.lat,0)/ps.length).toFixed(5),lon:+(ps.reduce((s,p)=>s+p.lon,0)/ps.length).toFixed(5),count:ps.length,latestObsDt:ps.map(p=>p.obsDt).filter(Boolean).sort().reverse()[0]||null,countries:[...new Set(ps.map(p=>p.country))].sort(),locName:ps.map(p=>p.locName).filter(Boolean)[0]||id})).sort((a,b)=>b.count-a.count||String(b.latestObsDt||'').localeCompare(String(a.latestObsDt||'')));const foreignOk=fp.length>0&&fc.length>0;const wd=Number(w.windDirectionDegrees??w.windDirectionDeg??NaN);const weather={windDirection:clean(w.windDirection??w.wind_direction),windSpeed:Number(w.windSpeed??w.wind_speed??0),precipitation:Number(w.precipitation??w.precipitationMm??0),windSupportScore:Math.max(0,Math.min(100,Math.round((Number(w.windSpeed??w.wind_speed??0)||0)*4-Math.min((Number(w.precipitation??w.precipitationMm??0)||0)*3,20))))};const targets=clusters.map(c=>{const d=days(c.newestEventDate),rep=Math.min(c.count/8,1),rec=d==null?0.15:Math.max(0,1-Math.min(d,365)/365),season=c.recentCount>0?1:0.7;let nfk=null,support=[],wind=false,reason='Ranked from real Estonia history clusters; no foreign eBird pressure available in current run.',score=0,et=c.recentCount>0?'24-48h':eta(d==null?5:Math.max(2,Math.round(d/30)));if(foreignOk){const ds=fc.map(x=>({x,k:dist(x.lat,x.lon,c.lat,c.lon)})).filter(x=>x.k!=null).sort((a,b)=>a.k-b.k);const nearest=ds[0]||null;nfk=nearest?+nearest.k.toFixed(1):null;support=[...new Set(ds.filter(x=>x.k<=350).flatMap(x=>x.x.countries||[]))].sort();score=nfk==null?0:Math.max(0,1-Math.min(nfk,700)/700);const fb=nearest?bearing(nearest.x.lat,nearest.x.lon,c.lat,c.lon):null;wind=Number.isFinite(wd)&&fb!=null?Math.abs((((wd-fb)%360)+540)%360-180)<=45:false;const fresh=ds.map(x=>x.x.latestObsDt).filter(Boolean).sort().reverse()[0]||null;et=fresh?eta(Math.max(1,days(fresh)??2)):et;reason=nfk==null?'Ranked from real Estonia history clusters with supporting foreign eBird evidence.':'Ranked from real Estonia history clusters and nearby foreign eBird pressure; nearest relevant foreign cluster '+nfk+' km away.';if(wind)reason+=' Wind is aligned with the observed approach.'}let conf=0.2+rep*0.3+rec*0.2+season*0.15+score*0.15;if(!foreignOk)conf=Math.min(conf,0.65);else if(wind)conf=Math.min(0.92,conf+0.05);return{rank:0,name:c.label,countyOrParish:c.municipality||c.locality||'Estonia',lat:c.lat,lon:c.lon,confidence:+Math.max(0.15,Math.min(foreignOk?0.92:0.65,conf)).toFixed(2),eta:et,searchRadiusKm:Math.max(1,Math.round(Number(req.hotspotRadiusKm||5))),habitatCue:c.locality||c.municipality||'Real Estonia history cluster',reason,derivedFromClusterId:c.clusterId||c.id,supportingEstoniaHistoryCount:c.count,latestSupportingEstoniaDate:c.newestEventDate||null,supportingCountries:support,nearestRelevantForeignClusterKm:nfk,windAdjusted:wind}}).sort((a,b)=>b.confidence-a.confidence||b.supportingEstoniaHistoryCount-a.supportingEstoniaHistoryCount).slice(0,Math.max(1,Number(req.outputCount||5))).map((t,i)=>({...t,rank:i+1}));const vectors=foreignOk?targets.slice(0,3).map((t,i)=>{const m=fc.map(c=>({c,k:dist(c.lat,c.lon,t.lat,t.lon)})).filter(x=>x.k!=null).sort((a,b)=>a.k-b.k)[0];return m?{id:'vector-'+(i+1),kind:'route',fromLat:m.c.lat,fromLon:m.c.lon,toLat:t.lat,toLon:t.lon,bearing:bearing(m.c.lat,m.c.lon,t.lat,t.lon),supportingCountries:m.c.countries||[],windAdjusted:Boolean(t.windAdjusted)}:null}).filter(Boolean):[];const countryScores={latvia:0,lithuania:0,belarus:0,poland:0,russia:0,finlandContextOnly:0};for(const p of fp){if(p.country==='LV')countryScores.latvia=Math.min(100,countryScores.latvia+10);if(p.country==='LT')countryScores.lithuania=Math.min(100,countryScores.lithuania+10);if(p.country==='BY')countryScores.belarus=Math.min(100,countryScores.belarus+10);if(p.country==='PL')countryScores.poland=Math.min(100,countryScores.poland+10);if(p.country==='RU')countryScores.russia=Math.min(100,countryScores.russia+10);if(p.country==='FI')countryScores.finlandContextOnly=Math.min(100,countryScores.finlandContextOnly+10)}const sourceHealth=[...(foreignOk?[]:[{source:'eBird foreign',status:'warning',message:'No foreign eBird pressure available in current run.'}])];return[{json:{speciesKey:req.speciesKey,speciesName:req.speciesName,generatedAt:new Date().toISOString(),externalPressureScore:foreignOk?Math.min(100,fp.length*4):0,springFitScore:Math.min(100,clusters.length*12),windSupportScore:Number(weather.windSupportScore||0),routeVector:foreignOk?'foreign-pressure-supported':'',bestEntryZone:targets[0]?.countyOrParish||'',alreadyMissedRisk:'low',countryScores,topPredictedPoints:targets,predictedTargets:targets,historicalHotspots:clusters.slice(0,Math.max(1,targets.length||5)).map((c,i)=>({rank:i+1,name:c.label||c.name||c.clusterId,countyOrParish:c.municipality||c.locality||'Estonia',lat:c.lat,lon:c.lon,confidence:Math.min(0.65,0.25+Math.min(Number(c.count||0),8)*0.05),derivedFromClusterId:c.clusterId||c.id})),insightSummary:foreignOk?'Prediction combines real Estonia history clusters with foreign eBird pressure and current weather.':'Prediction is currently ranked from real Estonia history clusters only because no foreign eBird pressure was available in this run.',estoniaHistoryPoints:points,estoniaHistoryClusters:clusters,foreignRecentPoints:fp,foreignClusters:fc,foreignEvidence:fc,weather,predictionVectors:vectors,supportingCountries:foreignOk?[...new Set(fp.map(p=>p.country))].sort():[],sourceHealth,latestEstoniaDate:latest?latest.eventDate:null,latestEstoniaLat:latest?latest.lat:null,latestEstoniaLon:latest?latest.lon:null,estoniaEvidence:{latestEstoniaDate:latest?latest.eventDate:null,latestEstoniaLat:latest?latest.lat:null,latestEstoniaLon:latest?latest.lon:null,latestEstoniaLocality:latest?latest.locality:null,recentCount7d:Number(r.recentCount7d||0),recentCount30d:Number(r.recentCount30d||0),historicalEstoniaCount:points.length,clusterCount:clusters.length},rawResearchPayload:{request:{requestType:req.requestType,speciesKey:req.speciesKey,speciesName:req.speciesName,latinName:req.latinName,summaryStyle:req.summaryStyle,summaryMaxLength:Number(req.summaryMaxLength||450),enableOpenAISummary:Boolean(req.enableOpenAISummary)},normalizedSources:{estoniaHistoryPoints:points,estoniaHistoryClusters:clusters,foreignRecentPoints:fp,foreignClusters:fc,weather},predictionVectors:vectors,predictedTargets:targets,sourceHealth},openAIAnalysisInput:{speciesKey:req.speciesKey,speciesName:req.speciesName,estoniaHistoryClusters:clusters,foreignClusters:fc,weather,predictedTargets:targets,sourceHealth}}}];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ ({ model: $env.OPENAI_MODEL || 'gpt-5-mini', temperature: 0.2, response_format: { type: 'json_schema', json_schema: { name: 'species_prediction_analysis', strict: true, schema: { type: 'object', additionalProperties: false, required: ['analysisVersion','insightSummary','confidenceNote','warnings','rerankedTopPredictedPoints','consistencyChecks'], properties: { analysisVersion: { type: 'string', const: 'openai_v1' }, insightSummary: { type: 'string' }, confidenceNote: { type: 'string' }, warnings: { type: 'array', items: { type: 'string' } }, rerankedTopPredictedPoints: { type: 'array', items: { type: 'object', additionalProperties: false, required: ['rank','name','countyOrParish','lat','lon','confidence','eta','searchRadiusKm','habitatCue','reason'], properties: { rank: { type: 'integer' }, name: { type: 'string' }, countyOrParish: { type: 'string' }, lat: { type: 'number' }, lon: { type: 'number' }, confidence: { type: 'number' }, eta: { type: 'string' }, searchRadiusKm: { type: 'number' }, habitatCue: { type: 'string' }, reason: { type: 'string' } } } }, consistencyChecks: { type: 'object', additionalProperties: false, required: ['routeLooksPlausible','timingLooksPlausible','weatherLooksSupportive','foreignPressureMatchesNarrative'], properties: { routeLooksPlausible: { type: 'boolean' }, timingLooksPlausible: { type: 'boolean' }, weatherLooksSupportive: { type: 'boolean' }, foreignPressureMatchesNarrative: { type: 'boolean' } } } } } } }, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are refining a species prediction for Estonian birding. Use only the provided evidence. Never invent countries, sightings, coordinates, or hotspots. You may only rerank or adjust the provided candidate points. If evidence is contradictory, say so briefly. Keep the summary short, concrete, and useful for birding decisions.' }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify({ instructions: { summaryStyle: $json.rawResearchPayload?.request?.summaryStyle || 'field_use', summaryMaxLength: Number($json.rawResearchPayload?.request?.summaryMaxLength || 450), allowedCoordinatesOnly: true, candidatePointsMustRemainSubsetOfProvidedPoints: true }, evidence: $json.openAIAnalysisInput || {} }) }] }) }}
